stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true of the dew point of an air parcel?

options.a: It can be used together with the air pressure to estimate the air parcel`s relative humidity
options.b: It can be higher than the temperature of the air parcel
options.c: It can only be equal to, or lower, than the temperature of the air parcel
options.d: It can be used to estimate the air parcel`s relative humidity even if the air temperature is unknown
